userStories.title: GQA Support in CausalSelfAttention
userStories.description: Add num_key_value_heads to config and implement grouped query attention with K/V broadcast.
acceptance: QASPTransformerConfig gains num_key_value_heads
CausalSelfAttention reshapes K/V to num_key_value_heads * head_dim
K/V broadcast to num_heads before SDPA
All existing tests pass
New test verifies GQA shape correctness

userStories.title: RoPE Position Embedding
userStories.description: Add Rotary Position Embeddings as optional replacement for learned absolute embeddings.
acceptance: Add QASP.models.rope module with RotaryEmbedding
Config gains use_rope bool (default False)
CausalSelfAttention applies RoPE to Q/K when enabled
Existing tests pass with use_rope=False
New test verifies RoPE changes phases but preserves norms

userStories.title: 1.5B Paper Configuration Preset
userStories.description: Add factory preset for the paper's 1.5B model architecture.
acceptance: QASPTransformerConfig.paper_1_5b() classmethod exists
create_qasp_transformer(preset='paper_1_5b') works
Test confirms param count within 5% of 1.5B

userStories.title: Training Skeleton (train.py)
userStories.description: Add a minimal but real training script with AdamW, cosine schedule, BF16, and checkpointing.
acceptance: QASP/scripts/train.py exists with full argparse
Uses HF datasets + tokenizers
Logs to console and TensorBoard
Saves checkpoints
--quick smoke test mode completes without error

userStories.title: Optional src/ ADN Bridge
userStories.description: Create integration module so QASP can optionally reuse src.attnres, src.rabitq, src.engram.
acceptance: QASP.integration module with try_import_src_* helpers
Config gains use_src_bridge bool (default False)
When enabled, uses src modules instead of local reimplementations
Graceful fallback when src/ unavailable
Test verifies bridge and fallback

userStories.title: Real Benchmark Runners
userStories.description: Replace stub benchmark functions with real evaluation pipelines.
acceptance: run_math_eval runs model on HF math dataset
run_qasp_ablation toggles components and measures real deltas
profile_qasp measures actual tokens/sec, memory, latency
All accept model=None and fall back to stubs for CI
Integration tests verify real-mode on tiny model

userStories.title: Ponder-Gated Quality Computation
userStories.description: Wire up gate_quality_computation so step() skips quality FFT when ponder gate is off.
acceptance: gate_quality_computation=True skips compute_quality_score in step() when gate off
Uses cached quality from prefill when available
Test verifies fewer FFT calls when gating is on
Existing parity tests still pass (with gating off)

userStories.title: README and Documentation Update
userStories.description: Add QASP/README.md documenting real vs stub benchmarks and architecture options.
acceptance: QASP/README.md exists with architecture table
Lists which benchmarks are real vs stub
Documents all new config flags
